name: Bug Report

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```yuspec
// Minimal .yus file that reproduces the issue
```

CLI command used:
```
yuspec1 test myfile.yus
```

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens. Include the full error output:

```
paste error output here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Compiler: [e.g. MSVC 2022, GCC 12, Clang 15]
- YUSPEC version / commit: [e.g. v1.0.1 or git SHA]
- CMake version:

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
